steps.title: Spot the reversal
steps.content: The first sentence says underground might make someone assume Garrett hid his antislavery views. The next sentence says the opposite: his views were well known. The transition must signal contradiction.

steps.title: Choose the contrast signal
steps.content: Choice A would introduce an example. Choice B would add a similar point. Choice C would show a result. None marks the reversal from secrecy to public knowledge. The answer is D.
